canonical_definition: Producing multiple coherent and fluent story continuations in parallel from a single prompt, where each branch diverges in narrative trajectory and conceptual content.
papers: RTE-GMoE: A Model-agnostic Approach for Relation Triplet Extraction via Graph-based Mixture-of-Expert Mutual Learning
